install.note: Claude Science is macOS + Linux only (no Windows build). After install, launch with `claude-science serve` — it starts the local daemon and opens the web UI in the browser. Science requires a Claude account login on first launch; EchoBird does not manage models or login for it (Science uses the user's own Claude subscription).

install_flow.summary: Download the platform build, place the binary on PATH (Linux) or /Applications (macOS), then launch with `claude-science serve`.
agent_steps: Detect OS and architecture first. Claude Science has NO Windows build — if the user is on Windows, tell them Science is macOS + Linux only (WSL2 is possible but EchoBird will not manage a WSL2 install).
macOS (Apple Silicon): download https://downloads.claude.ai/claude-science/latest/mac-arm64.dmg, mount it, drag Claude Science.app to /Applications.

Linux x64: run `curl -fL https://downloads.claude.ai/claude-science/latest/linux-x64 -o ~/.local/bin/claude-science && chmod +x ~/.local/bin/claude-science` (ensure ~/.local/bin is on PATH; create it if missing).
After install, tell the user to launch with `claude-science serve` in a terminal — it starts the daemon and opens the web UI. First launch requires Claude account login.
EchoBird lists Claude Science as a tool card (Utility category, 'no model config supported') — it does NOT switch models for Science. Science uses the user's own Claude subscription.
tell_user: Which build was installed (macOS arm64/x64, or Linux x64)
Install location (/Applications/Claude Science.app on macOS; ~/.local/bin/claude-science on Linux)
How to launch: `claude-science serve` in a terminal
That Claude Science is not available on Windows
